---
title: "Week 13: Deployment Architecture"
subtitle: "Cloud Patterns, Caching, and Scaling"
---

::: {.callout-note}
## Reading Assignment
Complete this reading before Week 14.
:::

## Overview

*Content coming soon.*

## Key Concepts

- Cloud deployment strategies
- Caching patterns
- Horizontal scaling
- Cost optimization

## Further Reading

- [Monolith vs Microservices](https://doi.org/10.1109/ACCESS.2022.3152803)
- [Microservices](https://aws.amazon.com/microservices/)
- [Serverless](https://www.serverless.com/framework/docs/providers/aws/guide/intro)
- [Vercel](https://vercel.com/docs/deployments)
- [Lambda Developer Guide](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/lambda/latest/dg/welcome.html)
